title: T-020 — UI: OEE-ADM-001 OEE Settings page (oee_settings_page prototype, 15-OEE-e)
prompt:
# T-020 — OEE-ADM-001 OEE Settings page UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.3 OEE-ADM-001, §15.7 + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md:719-803
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:698-833 (oee_settings_page)

## Goal
Server Component admin page `/oee/settings` rendering tenant default thresholds editor + per-line overrides table + Big Loss Mapping preview, gated by oee_admin role via middleware. Includes OEE-M-003 (line override create/edit) + OEE-M-004 (delete override type-to-confirm) + OEE-M-005 (Big Loss Mapping editor) modals. Matches prototype 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/page.tsx` (RSC): middleware redirect to /oee if role !== oee_admin; reads oee_alert_thresholds tenant row + per-line overrides + big_loss_categories preview (first 8).
2. `SettingsClient` ('use client'): inline-edit threshold form using RHF+Zod (each field z.number().min(0).max(100)); TanStack Table for overrides with [Edit]/[Delete] action column triggering OEE-M-003/M-004.
3. Three modals:
   - `line-override-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-003) per prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx:163-204 — RHF+Zod (line z.string() disabled on edit; 4 percentage fields min(0).max(100)); Server Action PUT oee_alert_thresholds.
   - `delete-override-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-004) per modals.jsx:350-370 — type-to-confirm pattern superRefine z.literal(data.line); Server Action DELETE + revalidatePath('/oee/settings') + invalidate threshold cache.
   - `big-loss-mapping-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-005) per modals.jsx:206-259 — Sheet (fullpage) + useFieldArray for dynamic mapping rows; Server Action PUT triggers MV refresh via T-010 outbox event `oee.daily.refreshed` (cache-bust via T-010 dispatcher).
4. Permission strings (T-001 enum): oee.target.edit, oee.override.create, oee.override.delete, oee.big_loss.map_edit checked in each Server Action.
5. P2 rows in the page (anomaly + maintenance trigger settings) render as disabled TableRow with Tooltip explaining P2 status (per translation note — do not hide).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist for page + each modal against prototype line ranges.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_components/settings-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_components/line-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_components/delete-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_components/big-loss-mapping-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_actions/{put-thresholds.ts,put-line-override.ts,delete-line-override.ts,put-big-loss-mapping.ts} [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/settings/_components/__tests__/settings-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:698-833 (oee_settings_page), then it has the tenant threshold editor + per-line overrides table + Big Loss Mapping preview + P2-disabled rows pattern — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given an unauthenticated request or a user without oee_admin role, when /oee/settings is requested, then the middleware redirects to /oee (V-OEE-ACCESS-2).
3. Given the line override modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx:163-204 (line_override_modal), then it has the 4-field threshold form with line Select (disabled on edit) and Save button gated by RHF isValid — verified by RTL parity checklist.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for the page and all 3 modals per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity (page + 3 modals) + middleware redirect + Server Action permission checks.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/settings`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip middleware role gate — admin-only page (V-OEE-ACCESS-2).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not hide P2 rows — render disabled with Tooltip per translation note.
- Do not skip MV refresh outbox after Big Loss Mapping save — re-classifies historical data per translation note.
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog or @radix-ui/react-* outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-ADM-001 page + 3 admin modals (line override, delete override, big-loss mapping) with Server Actions and oee_admin middleware gate; matches screens.jsx + modals.jsx prototypes.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Closes part of Auditor A OEE-007. Per-line overrides table reads oee_alert_thresholds; threshold defaults stored on tenant row (NULL line_id). Big Loss Mapping editor uses useFieldArray; Save triggers oee.daily.refreshed outbox event + warning toast about MV refresh lag (~5 min) per translation note.

Additional acceptance detail: UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for the page and all 3 modals per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
